case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $3,855.00 U.S. et al

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $3,855.00 U.S. CURRENCY; $38.00 U.S. CURRENCY DOES 1-100, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

LAW AND MOTION, 301, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO STRIKE THE CLAIM OF JONATHEN G. BOUGH IS OFF CALENDAR. RESPONDENT IS GRANTED LEAVE TO FILE AMENDED CLAIM UNDER CASE NO. 507513. PAMELA UNDERWOOD IS TO PREPARE AN ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189
MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-26-2007 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
ORDER GRANTING CLAIMANT JOHNATHEN G. BOUGH PERMISSION TO FILE FIRST AMENDED CLAIM OPPOSING FORFEITURE
(FIRST AMENDED) CLAIM OPPOSITION FORFEITURE FILED BY CLAIMANT BOUGH, JOHNATHEN G.

NTC OF MTN AND MTN TO STRIKE THE CLAIM OF JONATHEN G BOUGH, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA HEARING SET FOR SEP-26-2007 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
POS OF ORDER GRANTING CLAIMANT JOHNATHEN G BOUGH PERMISSION TO FILE FIRST AMENDED CLAIM OPPOSING FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA BOUGH, JOHNATHEN G.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $3,750.00 BE RELEASED TO CLAIMANT JOHNATHEN G. BOUGH. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $105.00 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. ANY STIPULATIONS WHICH STAYED THIS FORFEITURE PROCEEDING IS RELEASED. CLAIMANT WAIVES HIS/HER RIGHT TO HAVE SAME JUDGE OR JURY DECIDE BOTH THE CRIMINAL AND FORFEITURE CASE. CLAIMANT WAIVES CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
